title: Glassy Happy Ghast
description: Glassy Hapy Ghast lets you see through Happy Ghasts with a transparent glass-like appearance.
body: ![Super cool glassy ghasts](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/212bb655404dbb3a743845f37fee635556d761e1_0.webp)Happy Ghast with glass texture! This resource pack gives happy Ghasts a nice appearance and allows you to see through them.
